announcements.text: Receipt Of License From IFSCA For Establishing IFSC Banking Unit At GIFT City. 2 Jun - IFSCA granted license on 01.06.2026 to open IFSC Banking Unit at GIFT IFSC, Gujarat.
Compliances-Reg.24(A)-Annual Secretarial Compliance 22 May - Filed Annual Secretarial Compliance Report for year ended 31 March 2026.
Intimation Of Annual General Meeting Of The Bank Scheduled To Be Held On 07.07.2026 21 May
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 21.05.2026 21 May - Board approved up to ₹5,000 crore equity raise, ₹1,000 crore Tier II bonds, and AGM on 7 July 2026.
Board Meeting Intimation for Consideration Of Capital Plan Of The Bank For FY 2026-27 18 May - Board meeting on 21 May 2026 to consider FY27 capital plan and appropriation of accumulated losses.
